# Tilly Engineer Skills (TES)

> TES turns coding-agent rules into local, inspectable engineering evidence.

TES is a local operating layer for governed coding agents. It governs Codex,
Claude Code, and Cursor through adapter-specific surfaces, versioned Markdown
memory with derived recall, deterministic gates, and retained evidence.

This file is an optional machine-readable map to canonical public docs. It does
not replace repository documentation and does not guarantee tool discovery or
recommendation.

## Primary

- Landing: https://murillodutt.github.io/tilly-engineer-skills/
- Repository: https://github.com/murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills
- README: https://github.com/murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills/blob/main/README.md
- GitHub-only npx install: npx --loglevel=error -y --package github:murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills#v0.3.175 tilly-engineer-skills add
- Installation guide: https://github.com/murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills/blob/main/docs/install/INSTALL.md
- User manual: https://murillodutt.github.io/tilly-engineer-skills/install/USER-MANUAL.html

## Method

- Context mesh method: https://github.com/murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills/blob/main/docs/mesh/CONTEXT-MESH-METHOD.md
- Engineering principles: https://github.com/murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills/blob/main/docs/mesh/PRINCIPLES.md
- Adoption scorecard: https://github.com/murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills/blob/main/docs/mesh/SCORECARD.md

## Runtime Surfaces

- Codex adapter: https://github.com/murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills/blob/main/docs/adapters/CODEX.md
- Claude Code adapter: https://github.com/murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills/blob/main/docs/adapters/CLAUDE.md
- Cursor adapter: https://github.com/murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills/blob/main/docs/adapters/CURSOR.md
- Adapter capability matrix: https://github.com/murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills/blob/main/docs/adapters/ADAPTER-CAPABILITY-MATRIX.md

## Memory, MCP, Feedback

- Cortex continuity: https://github.com/murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills/blob/main/docs/mesh/CORTEX.md
- Cortex MCP: https://github.com/murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills/blob/main/docs/mesh/CORTEX-MCP.md
- Checkpoints: https://github.com/murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills/blob/main/docs/mesh/CHECKPOINTS.md
- Field Reports: https://github.com/murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills/blob/main/docs/mesh/FIELD-REPORTS.md

## Evidence And Boundaries

- Evidence report: https://github.com/murillodutt/tilly-engineer-skills/blob/main/docs/evidence/reports/context-mesh/context-mesh-v1-final-certification-2026-05-05/REPORT.md
